title: Sparky Pie
body:
# 🥧 Sparky Pie ✨

Sparky Pie is a modpack aiming for the best Minecraft Vanilla experience, both in performance and user experience!

This modpack was made by PainOchoco, owner of [La Boulangerie](https://laboulangerie.net)'s Minecraft server offering a new level of immersion and smooth gameplay for their players, this modpack is totally optional but recommended.

## 📦 Features

<details>
<summary>⚡️ Lots of optimizations and bugs fix</summary>

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton), [C2M](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), [Modern Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify), [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

</details>


<details>
<summary>🔥 OptiFine-like mods</summary>

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui), [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)

</details>


<details>
<summary>☀️ Shaders</summary>

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Complementary Shaders Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), [Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)

</details>



<details>
<summary>💫 Visual & sounds improvements</summary>

([Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves), [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)

</details>


<details>
<summary>🖥️ Interface improvements</summary>

[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud), [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory), [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping), [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls), [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip), [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)

</details>


<details>
<summary>🛠️ Utility mods</summary>

[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica), [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)

</details>
